metadata.title: TorsoTwist
metadata.description: A soothing torso twist stretch practice that improves flexibility, posture, and body ease.

benefits: Keeps the whole body active with smooth, manageable movement.
Supports smoother joint movement during daily tasks.
Encourages better posture and body alignment.
Promotes relaxation and helps release built-up tension.
instructions: Ease into torso twist stretch with soft, unforced movement from the very first rep.
Let your breath guide the pace of the stretch or flow.
Stay within a comfortable range instead of chasing a deep stretch.
Return to the start position slowly to keep the movement controlled.
safetyTips: Never force a stretch beyond a comfortable limit.
Use a mat, cushion, or folded towel if your knees or back need support.
Move out of the position slowly to avoid sudden light-headedness.
Skip any motion that causes pinching, pulling, or instability.

metadata.title: CalfRaise
metadata.description: A supportive standing calf raises exercise that develops safe strength and better movement control.

benefits: Activates the lower legs and can help ease heaviness around the ankles.
Improves stability and controlled muscle engagement.
Supports posture by strengthening key support muscles.
Encourages more balanced movement with better body awareness.
instructions: Set up for standing calf raises with stable footing and a controlled starting position.
Move through each repetition slowly instead of using momentum.
Keep your core gently engaged while maintaining smooth breathing.
Finish each repetition with control before beginning the next one.
safetyTips: Use support from a wall, chair, or stable surface whenever balance feels uncertain.
Avoid holding your breath while lifting, pressing, or lowering.
Reduce the range of motion if your abdomen, back, or joints feel strained.
Stop immediately if you notice pain, cramping, or a pulling sensation.
